chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No.D-1362 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA No.5263/2022 3. For hearing of main case. 01.03.2023 None present for the Petitioner M/s. Ali Raza Balouch, Zahid Farooq Mazari and Shahryar Imdad Awan, AAGs along with Pervaiz Ahmed Balouch, Special Secretary Schools, Education and Literacy Department, Ms. Abid Lodhi, Special Secretary (Law), Piyar Ali Lakho, Deputy Secertary, Javed Ali Khawaja, Deputy Secretary and Fida Hussain Tanwri, Deputy Accountant General, Sindh ***************** Salahuddin Panhwar, J:- Pursuant to order dated 26.01.2023, Additional Secretary, Finance Department, Government of Sindh, has submitted compliance report annexed with up-gradation letter as well as Special Secretary (Law) has submitted report, which are taken on record. As per compliance report, posts of newly appointed PSTs under the recruitment policy 2021 has been upgraded from BPS-09 to 14 vide letter dated 14.02.2023, annexed herewith. Deputy Accountant General, Sindh present submits his parawise comments. Being relevant, para-2 of comments is reproduced herewith:- “Clarification from Finance Department has been received vide U.O.No.F.D(SR-II)2-70/2021/School Edu. Karachi dated 14th February, 2023 and circulated for compliance to all DAOs vide this office circular No.AGS/TM/Endorsement/2022-23/707 dated 24.02.2023 (Copy enclosed) and the process of creation of IDs for release of salaries has been initiated at AG Office and DAOs”. Further respective officers undertake that they are working with regard to release of salaries of PSTs and JESTs on war footings and they ensure that every teacher newly appointed will receive salary in his account within stipulated period i.e. two months.

Karachi dated 14th February, 2023 and circulated for compliance to all DAOs vide this office circular No.AGS/TM/Endorsement/2022-23/707 dated 24.02.2023 (Copy enclosed) and the process of creation of IDs for release of salaries has been initiated at AG Office and DAOs”. Further respective officers undertake that they are working with regard to release of salaries of PSTs and JESTs on war footings and they ensure that every teacher newly appointed will receive salary in his account within stipulated period i.e. two months. Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS JUDGE
